title: Planchonella arnhemica
taxonomy: Planchonella arnhemica is classified within the family Sapotaceae, which comprises a large group of tropical trees. This plant is also assigned to the order Ericales and the class Magnoliopsida. The genus Planchonella is further classified under the family Sapotaceae due to its similarities in characteristics and features. At the phylum level, Planchonella arnhemica belongs to the phylum Magnoliophyta, also known as angiosperms. The combination of these classifications places Planchonella arnhemica within the broader taxonomic group of flowering plants.
